title: lastrea montana
intro: Lastrea montana, also known as the Mountain Lady fern, is a species of fern native to the Himalayan region. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Lastrea montana include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and act as an immune system booster. Herbal preparations of Lastrea montana can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often used to treat a range of health conditions, including coughs, colds, and digestive problems.
